name: cyberian
description: Workplace productivity tools — timesheet, JIRA, calendars, and more

skills.name: timecard
skills.description: Fill and manage timesheets in TimeCard. Trigger when user asks about: timesheet, timecard, work hours, filling hours, checking attendance.

skills.name: wedaka
skills.description: Clock in/out and manage attendance in WeDaka. Trigger when user asks about: clock in, clock out, punch in, punch out, attendance, timelog.

skills.name: jira
skills.description: Interact with JIRA — list, view, create, edit, move, assign, comment on, or search issues, manage epics, sprints, and boards. Trigger when user mentions JIRA issue keys (e.g., PROJ-123), asks about project status, or wants to perform any JIRA-related workflow.

skills.name: outlook-calendar
skills.description: Read Outlook calendar events via ICS subscription. Trigger when user asks about meetings, schedule, calendar, appointments, availability, or what's on their calendar.
